pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Midnight Lurker is built around a classic night threat: something that belongs in darkness and feels wrong when seen too clearly.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It makes darkness feel occupied, like the night is hiding a hunter.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)Its horror comes from how naturally it fits into darkness.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)The player feels like they should not stay outside for too long once it appears.
